headline: Model compression techniques broke out across the quarter even as agent orchestration cooled from its peak.
body: Quantization and hybrid strategy emerged as the quarter's clearest breakouts, alongside a cluster of new entrants tied to browser sandboxing (sandboxed iframe, same-origin policy, srcdoc, sandbox attribute). Meanwhile the prior leaders, model pruning and prompt orchestration, both weakened, and multi-session workflows, LLM harness, AI coding, and scoped skills all slipped to lagging. On the agent side, new items detail layered Hermes agent builds connecting Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, and DeepSeek into unified workflows, Microsoft Scout acting proactively across Teams and email, and MiniMax M3 shipping open weights with 1-million-token context and Anthropic and OpenAI compatible endpoints. Coverage also surfaced silent web-access failures in agents that claim to search but hit CAPTCHAs or fall back to stale data.

cited_items.title: Every Level of Hermes Agent Explained
Your Agent's Biggest Lie: "I Searched the Web" — Rafael Levi, Bright Data
Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
